title: ochna polyantha
intro: Ochna polyantha, also known as the small-leaved sourberry or ochna, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ochnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochna polyantha include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
